front.title: A dark ice knife
front.description:
A hilt of bone, with a spike of dark ice tapering to a sharp point. The ice is hard as stone, and not especially sharp.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.DeWQFy1cWoLRvoU5]{Rime Lords}.*

back.title: A dark ice knife
back.description:
When you **_stab an undead entity with the_** **_knife_**, ask the GM whether it is driven by obsession, hunger, and/or vengeance. If the answer is “yes,” then deal +1d4 damage (ignores armor), and leave the entity briefly disoriented. Should this reduce the entity to 0 HP, the dark ice knife melts away along with whatever bound the entity to this world.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.DeWQFy1cWoLRvoU5]{Rime Lords}.*
